overall.description: A first-person walk through a futuristic cyberpunk city at dusk, featuring towering skyscrapers, palm-lined streets, and a waterfront promenade with wet reflective pavement. Flying vehicles pass overhead in the hazy orange-lit atmosphere of Night City.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic urban street with elevated monorail track

events.description: camera pans down from skyward view of skyscrapers to street level
flying vehicle passes overhead from right to left in the distance

agents.ego_description: walking along the wet city street beneath towering skyscrapers and an elevated rail line

entered.detail: slender futuristic tower with vertical brown paneling and white accents
curved elevated monorail track with concrete supports and metal rails
multi-story building with reflective blue-tinted glass facade
tropical palm trees lining the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a view looking up at a towering brown skyscraper and elevated rail structure against an overcast orange sky. The camera pans down to street level and walks forward along wet asphalt, passing palm trees and modern glass buildings while a flying vehicle passes overhead in the distance.

events.description: turning left to reveal waterfront railing and open ocean view
flying vehicle descends and passes low overhead from left to right

agents.ego_description: walking along the waterfront promenade passing futuristic benches and trash bins

entered.detail: metal safety railing separating the walkway from the water
futuristic public seating with yellow frames and green seats covered in stickers
large green industrial dumpster situated between benches
calm water with distant industrial structures visible on the horizon

segments.scene_description: The camera turns left to reveal a wide waterfront promenade with the ocean visible beyond a metal railing. Yellow and green benches line the left side as the camera walks past trash bins. A flying vehicle passes low overhead, and the wet pavement reflects the surrounding futuristic architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: open waterfront plaza approaching pedestrian area

events.description: flying vehicle passes overhead from left to right
second flying vehicle passes overhead from left to right

agents.ego_description: continuing along the open promenade toward a group of pedestrians walking in the distance

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians walking along the promenade ahead

entered.detail: dark high-rise building with grid-patterned windows rising prominently on the left
small group of people visible walking in the distance along the path

segments.scene_description: The camera continues along the open waterfront plaza, passing the benches and approaching a group of pedestrians in the distance. Two flying vehicles pass overhead sequentially, and a tall black residential tower dominates the left side of the frame while the wet pavement continues to reflect the warm dusk lighting.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from the towering heights of a dense urban canyon to the open expanse of a reflective waterfront promenade. It begins by looking up at a brown skyscraper and elevated rail against an overcast orange sky before panning down to walk along wet asphalt lined with palm trees and glass buildings. As the camera turns left, the urban density gives way to a wide promenade where the ocean is visible beyond a metal railing and yellow and green benches line the path. The scene then expands across the open plaza, passing trash bins and pedestrians while flying vehicles streak across the hazy sky. Finally, the movement continues past a dominating black residential tower, with the wet pavement consistently reflecting the warm, golden dusk lighting of the city.
